message:
So, the other day, I was out walking my dog, Max, and he decided to chase a squirrel right into a thicket. As I was calling him back, I suddenly realized my pockets were packed with the essentials: a water bottle, some treats, and even a portable dog bowl. I felt like a superhero! 

For once, I was the prepared one! It was such a relief knowing I had what I needed right there. It got me thinking about how little moments like these show the value of being ready, even for our furry friends. 

Have you ever had a moment when you were just so glad you were prepared? This little refresher helped me out!
